office_does: The commission sets utility policy and rates and oversees electric and water operations.
race_blurb: Five candidates seek the open seat; the rubric defines no axis applicable to this PUD contest.

candidates.summary: Retired PUD engineer emphasizing low rates, reliability, conservation, consolidation, and water supply.
Area resident emphasizing affordability, accountability, assistance, and cautious merger review.
Professional engineer emphasizing renewable generation, resilience, and water research.
highlights: Has more than 30 years of public-works experience [S2]

candidates.summary: Former PUD commissioner emphasizing rate pressure, regional leverage, and water constraints.
highlights: Has 30 years in the electric-utility industry [S2]

candidates.summary: Community-development specialist emphasizing partnerships, oversight, cost-benefit analysis, and grants.
